# `setHi`

**Systems:** MOS6502  
**Parameters:** `a, a`

---

<div markdown="0" class="trse-help-body">

<p>Sets the high bit of the address in parameter 0.</p>
<p>For now, arrays/pointers must be of type byte
<p><strong>Examples:</strong></p>
<p><code>sethi(myInteger, $33); // sets the high bit in myInteger to $33
<p><code>sethi(myPointer, b); // sets the high bit in myPointer to value in variable b
</code></p>


</div>
